title: MLOps Engineer
description: Scale Intelligence deploys AI solutions for Fortune 500 companies. Our MLOps team builds the infrastructure that takes models from notebook to production. You'll own CI/CD for ML, model registries, feature stores, and monitoring for 30+ production ML models.
responsibilities: Build ML deployment pipelines for 30+ production models
Implement model drift detection and automated retraining triggers
Maintain feature store serving real-time ML features at <10ms p99
Reduce model deployment time from days to hours
